audit.title: AgentForge Arena Hardcore Evaluation Report
audit.scope: Technical, mathematical, task, real-evaluation, domain, report, reproducibility, security, incident-timeline, and product audit

task_validation.caveat: validate_task checks tests/reference consistency, not semantic conformance to task descriptions

report.regeneration: PASS: before, after, and HEAD hashes identical
report.visual_rendering: UNVERIFIED: local file browser target blocked by audit environment

leaderboard.contract_contamination: At least one stored expression-evaluator pass is nonconforming

task_audit.notes: Clear; comprehensive for its toy five-character contract.
Strong edges; snapshot baseline passes 3/9 hidden and can inflate continuous partial S.
Hashability is unspecified although reference uses a set.
Useful retry and exception tests; thin visible/type edges.
Cancellation tested; timing is host-sensitive.
Good subtractive coverage; numeral validation intentionally absent.
Core recency covered; nonpositive capacity undefined.
Regex grammar is partly ambiguous and tests are narrow.
Strong behavior; performance tag is not strongly enforced.
Precise API; invalid constructor inputs unspecified.
Coherent exact API and meaningful map no-call test.
Good stated checks; not a general platform filename policy.
Strong current suite; all published rows are v1.0.0.
Cancellation and last-input exception contract are explicit.
Invalid limit and exception cleanup coverage are weak.
Solid POSIX core; root/base edge semantics thin.
Good large discriminator; standard task may be difficulty 3.
Simple task with 1/25 result; likely adapter/output confound and difficulty inflation.
Strong current delegation suite; all published rows are v1.0.0.
Strong current probes; published gemma outlier is on v1.0.0.
Clear and strong; 0/25 requires a stronger-agent calibration anchor.
Good scale tests; canonical idiom makes d4 slightly high.
Reference accepts hosted javascript/data/ftp schemes contrary to description.
Hidden suite awards a parser with wrong associativity/unary-minus behavior; eval prohibition unenforced.

findings.title: Published qwen score contains a demonstrated task-contract false positive
findings.evidence: DB id 550; persisted expression parser returns 9 for 10-3-2, 4 for 8/4/2, and crashes on 1+-2 and 1/-2

findings.title: Redirect reference/hidden suite violate the security contract
findings.evidence: Reference accepts javascript://app.example.com and data://app.example.com

findings.title: Arbitrary agents can read hidden/reference paths
findings.evidence: run_once passes full Task with absolute task_dir/reference_dir to agent.act

findings.title: No host security or dependency isolation
findings.evidence: LocalSandbox warning; persisted qwen patch imports host NetworkX 3.4.2

findings.title: 75 published rows use obsolete task versions
findings.evidence: Three tasks current 1.0.1 vs stored 1.0.0, 25 rows each

findings.title: Per-run model/config/seed provenance is insufficient
findings.evidence: DB lacks digest/config/transcript/seed; resume resets call counter

findings.title: Executable leaderboard is micro-pooled while framework specifies macro-domain
findings.evidence: report.py leaderboard counts all runs; framework domain/ranking sections require macro

findings.title: Timeout and infra gates do not behave as documented end to end
findings.evidence: run_once cannot kill hung in-process agent; grader timeouts remain VALID losses

findings.title: Legacy forensic artifacts missing
findings.evidence: 500/600 rows lack patches/tests; all rows lack transcript text

findings.title: Real evaluation primarily benchmarks a single-shot prompt/parser adapter
findings.evidence: OllamaAgent never runs visible tests and only parses fenced complete-file blocks

findings.title: Report wrong-fix category conflates hidden misses and gate failures
findings.evidence: Changed nonpasses are labeled wrong-fix without gate/status distinction

findings.title: Q=1 is unmeasured but displayed as perfect
findings.evidence: All 600 q values are 1; no quality toolchain executes

findings.title: Deterministic evidence policy is not implemented
findings.evidence: Determinism detected but repeats still count; synthetic baselines get Wilson n=120

findings.title: Run identity uniqueness and formula-version selection are unenforced
findings.evidence: No unique agent/task/version/idx constraint; load join does not filter formula_version

findings.title: Domain evidence is backend-heavy and overlapping
findings.evidence: backend 17/24 tasks; API/performance only three primary tasks

findings.title: Task difficulty/discrimination is uneven
findings.evidence: query-builder d4 qwen7 0/5; gemma top-k 4/5; toposort 0/25

findings.title: Visible tests are weak and unused by the real adapter
findings.evidence: Many one/two-test visible suites; OllamaAgent does not execute them

findings.title: Performance gates are host-dependent
findings.evidence: 20-second whole-suite timeouts with no pinned CPU/container

findings.title: Rank ranges are heuristic, not simultaneous confidence ranks
findings.evidence: LCB_a > p_hat_b one-sided rule, no family-wise correction

findings.title: Full suite emits SQLite ResourceWarnings
findings.evidence: Seven unclosed-connection ResourceWarnings

findings.title: Product surface is absent
findings.evidence: No FastAPI/Next.js/dashboard/product CLI/run viewer/contributor guide

findings.title: Literal python command unavailable
findings.evidence: python command not found; README correctly uses python3

findings.title: Pre-existing audit artifacts were stale and untracked
findings.evidence: Old audit commit f70eb6d was superseded; current artifacts are grouped under codex-audit/ and the historical HTML is explicitly labeled legacy

findings.title: Report detail relies on hover-only title text
findings.evidence: Task/domain intervals encoded in title attributes

findings.title: Editable allow-lists are package-wide rather than target-file-specific
findings.evidence: Every task uses package/**

findings.title: Weights and task metadata lack schema validation
findings.evidence: load_task accepts unchecked weights/difficulties/path suite details

mandatory_next_steps: Fix/quarantine expression-evaluator and validate-redirect-url, then rerun affected cells
Version and reconcile macro/micro ranking, timeout/infra, deterministic evidence, Q semantics, and continuous scoring
Implement pinned network-disabled agent/grader isolation with a sanitized public task view
Rerun all five models on current task versions with stable derived seeds and full forensic/config artifacts
Add run-identity uniqueness, formula-version selection, and evaluation configuration persistence
